user.title: Set up AlphaESS Modbus
user.description: Configure connection to your AlphaESS inverter

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AlphaESS Modbus
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for your AlphaESS inverter

error.invalid_connection: Please enter a valid host / IP address

force_charge.name: Force charge
force_charge.description: Start force charging using Dispatch Mode 2.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

cutoff_soc.name: Cutoff SoC (%)
cutoff_soc.description: Stop charging when battery reaches this SoC.

force_discharge.name: Force discharge
force_discharge.description: Start force discharging using Dispatch Mode 2.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

cutoff_soc.name: Cutoff SoC (%)
cutoff_soc.description: Stop discharging when battery reaches this SoC.

force_export.name: Force export
force_export.description: Start force export (mapped to force discharge path).

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

cutoff_soc.name: Cutoff SoC (%)
cutoff_soc.description: Stop exporting when battery reaches this SoC.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Dispatch mode number (e.g. 2 for SoC control).

dispatch_reset.name: Dispatch reset
dispatch_reset.description: Reset all dispatch registers to defaults.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

sync_datetime.name: Synchronise date and time
sync_datetime.description: Write Home Assistant local date/time to inverter registers.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

set_charging_periods.name: Set charging periods
set_charging_periods.description: Write charging period 1 and 2 start/stop times.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).

set_discharging_periods.name: Set discharging periods
set_discharging_periods.description: Write discharging period 1 and 2 start/stop times.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: The config entry to target (optional if only one inverter).
